message.content:
install /plugin marketplace add skills-directory/skill-codex
/plugin install skill-codex@skill-codex in claude settings json\
and create pr

content.thinking:
The user wants me to:
1. Install a plugin called "skill-codex" from the skills-directory marketplace
2. Add it to Claude settings JSON
3. Create a PR

Let me first understand the current project structure and how plugins are configured.

content.text:
Now I understand the pattern. Looking at the existing `config/claude/settings.json`, I need to:

1. Add `"skill-codex@skill-codex": true` to `enabledPlugins`
2. Add the `skill-codex` marketplace entry to `extraKnownMarketplaces`

Let me also check how `default.nix` deploys this settings file.
Now I'll create a branch and make the changes.

gh pr create --title "feat: add skill-codex plugin" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add `skill-codex` plugin from `skills-directory/skill-codex` marketplace to Claude settings
- Registers the marketplace source and enables the plugin

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify `claude` loads the skill-codex plugin on next session

Done. PR created: https://github.com/shunkakinoki/dotfiles/pull/902

Changes made to `config/claude/settings.json`:
- Added `"skill-codex@skill-codex": true` to `enabledPlugins`
- Added `skill-codex` marketplace entry pointing to `skills-directory/skill-codex` on GitHub under `extraKnownMarketplaces`
